title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map grew new paths
gist.blurb: The API reference has been regenerated from the live OpenAPI spec. A few more signposts now point where the endpoints actually go.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the production OpenAPI specification, adding 65 lines and updating 30 so the published API reference matches deployed behavior.
gist.impact: Developers get an API reference that more closely reflects the endpoints and schema details currently available in production.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polli as a tiny cartographer with a rolled API map, updating route markers around a cozy garden-path network of code-plants. A retro terminal can show simple pixel text such as “API DOCS,” with flowers and signposts representing newly documented endpoints.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny explorer hat, carefully pinning fresh route markers onto a glowing API map beside code-plants and garden signposts; a friendly CRT terminal displays simple pixel text: “API DOCS.” Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, dark purple (#110518) outlines, emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny explorer hat, carefully pinning fresh route markers onto a glowing API map beside code-plants and garden signposts; a friendly CRT terminal displays simple pixel text: “API DOCS.” Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, dark purple (#110518) outlines, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
